mod-colorarea-min-width.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorArea`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-area-minimum-width)`, if not set.

mod-colorarea-min-height.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorArea`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-area-minimum-height)`, if not set.

mod-colorarea-width.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorArea`, `.spectrum-ColorArea-handle`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-area-width)`, if not set.

mod-colorarea-height.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorArea`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-area-height)`, if not set.

mod-colorarea-border-radius.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorArea`, `.spectrum-ColorArea-gradient`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-area-border-rounding)`, if not set.

mod-colorarea-border-width.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorArea`, `.spectrum-ColorArea.is-disabled`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-area-border-width)`, if not set.

mod-colorarea-border-color.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorArea`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-colorarea-border-color)`, if not set.

mod-colorarea-disabled-background-color.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorArea.is-disabled`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-disabled-background-color)`, if not set.

highcontrast-colorarea-border-color.description: Defined in `.spectrum-ColorArea`. Used by `.spectrum-ColorArea`. Defaults to `var(--mod-colorarea-border-color, var(--spectrum-colorarea-border-color))`, if not set.

highcontrast-colorarea-fill-color-disabl.description: Defined in `.spectrum-ColorArea`. Used by `.spectrum-ColorArea.is-disabled`. Defaults to `var(--mod-colorarea-disabled-background-color, var(--spectrum-disabled-background-color))`, if not set.
